title: ✈️TRAVELLING OPPORTUNITIES✈️|EVENTS SALES CREW
description:
Axisreach Organisation is a dynamic marketing organisation in Singapore and we’re on the lookout for enthusiastic go-getters ready to grow with us. If you’re passionate about people, eager to learn, and driven to succeed – we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Be Doing:
🧐 Dive Into Market Insights – Learn how to analyse audiences and stay ahead of industry trends.

🫵🏽 Master the Art of Marketing – Build deep knowledge of products and services to deliver real value.

🗣️ Connect with Clients – Create meaningful connections through direct, face-to-face engagement.

✨ Lead the Charge – Contribute to the planning and execution of impactful sales and marketing campaigns.


What’s In It For You:
🎓 Mentorship & Training – Structured learning and one-on-one guidance to help you grow.

📈 Fast-Track Career Paths – Clear advancement opportunities towards leadership and management roles.

✈️ Global Exposure – Travel and connect with professionals abroad through exciting networking opportunities.

🎉 Vibrant Team Culture – Be part of an energetic, collaborative team that values growth and success.

No experience? No worries – all you need is a positive mindset and the drive to learn!


📩 Apply today and take your first step toward a fulfilling and dynamic career!

postedCompany.description:
At AxisReach Recruitment Organisation, we’re not just another sales and marketing company — we’re a growing team of passionate people who believe in creating real connections and delivering real results.

We work closely with some of the biggest names in the service industry, helping them reach their audience through a face-to-face marketing approach that’s proven, personal, and effective. By being on the ground and truly engaging with people, we build stronger brand reputations and long-lasting customer relationships.

What drives us is simple: passion, commitment, and the belief that great products and services deserve to be seen, experienced, and appreciated. Whether it’s working with businesses, professionals, or everyday consumers, we bring energy and integrity to everything we do.

Our team is what makes AxisReach stand out. We’re a diverse, motivated group with shared values and a common goal — to grow together, support one another, and go above and beyond for our clients
postedCompany.name: AXISREACH RECRUITMENT

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
